allow:

git mv frontend/src/app/components/live-dashboard/live-dashboard.component.css frontend/src/app/components/pages/live-session/ && \\
rmdir frontend/src/app/components/live-dashboard 2>/dev/null && \\
git mv frontend/src/app/components/session-summary frontend/src/app/components/pages/live-session/session-summary && \\
git mv frontend/src/app/components/zombie-game frontend/src/app/components/pages/live-session/zombie-game)
